nasb.text: They speak falsehood to one another; With flattering lips and with a double heart they speak.

esv.text: Everyone utters lies to his neighbor; with flattering lips and a double heart they speak.

cnv.text: 他們彼此說謊， 用諂媚的嘴唇說話，口是心非。

ccb.text: 人人谎话连篇， 花言巧语，口是心非。

csbs.text: 人人向邻舍说谎， 他们说话油嘴滑舌，心怀二意。
